Scott Mills sacked from BBC Radio 2 after allegations over 'historic relationship'He has not hosted his show since Tuesday and the BBC said he is "no longer contracted to work" there. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckge1yn50y8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckge1yn50y8o#0 Mon, 30 Mar 2026 13:48:04 GMT
